quotes.text: I don't want to be a product of my environment. I want my environment to be a product of me.
quotes.speaker: The Departed (2006)

quotes.text: She's not lost, she's just somewhere I haven't looked yet.

quotes.text: I've done this route fourteen times, Captain. I know where the rocks are.
